data.title: Vista Gold Announces Voting Results from Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: In Denver, Vista Gold Corp. (NYSE American and TSX: VGZ) revealed the outcome of its recent annual general and special shareholder meeting on April 28, 2026. A significant percentage of the total common shares, specifically 80,429,324 shares representing 55.49%, were present at the meeting. The detailed results of the ballot votes, especially for the election of directors, were disclosed.

data.title: ADOPTION OF RESOLUTIONS OF THE GENERAL MEETING OF AS SILVANO FASHION GROUP WITHOUT NOTICE OF THE MEETING
data.description: The Management Board of AS Silvano Fashion Group, a company with registry code 10175491 and address at Tulika 17, 10613 Tallinn, is suggesting to the shareholders to approve resolutions without holding a meeting as per § 299 1 of the Commercial Code.

data.title: NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust Announces Quarterly Distribution
data.description: In Dallas on April 28, 2026, NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust (NXDT) revealed a quarterly distribution of $0.15 per common share of NXDT. This distribution is a mix of cash and common shares of NXDT, approved by the board of trustees.

data.title: RPC, Inc. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: RPC, Inc. (NYSE: RES) based in Atlanta disclosed that it will unveil the financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, on Thursday, May 7, 2026, before the market commences. Alongside the earnings disclosure, the corporation is set to conduct a...

data.title: Laserfiche Introduces AI Agents: The Future of Intelligent Content Management
data.description: Las Vegas - Laserfiche recently introduced AI Agents designed to streamline intricate workflows using natural language, ensuring secure, compliant, and intelligent content management.

data.title: Cornerstone Bancorp, Inc Quarterly Report - March 31, 2026
data.description: In Palatine, Illinois, as of April 28, 2026, Cornerstone Bancorp, Inc. released its first quarter 2026 financial highlights for the period ending on March 31, 2026. The consolidated net income for the quarter was reported at $2.4 million, translating to $2.48 per diluted share. This is an increase compared to the first quarter of 2025, where the net income was $2.0 million, or $2.06 per share.

data.title: DENARIUS METALS ANNOUNCES DETAILS FOR THE APRIL 30, 2026 INTEREST PAYMENTS ON ITS CONVERTIBLE UNSECURED DEBENTURES AND THE GOLD PREMIUM PAYMENTS DUE ON ITS 2023 DEBENTURES
data.description: Denarius Metals Corp. (Cboe CA: DMET) (OTCQX: DNRSF) disclosed plans for the upcoming monthly interest payments scheduled for April 30, 2026, regarding its convertible unsecured debentures maturing on October 19, 2029.

data.title: NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust Announces Preferred Share Distribution
data.description: Dallas, April 28, 2026 - NexPoint Diversified Real Estate Trust (NYSE: NXDT) disclosed a distribution of $0.34375 per share for its 5.50% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares (NYSE: NXDT PR A). The distribution is slated to be disbursed on June 30...

data.title: NCR Atleos Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
data.description: Atlanta-based NCR Atleos Corporation (NYSE: NATL) is set to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after the market closes. In light of the ongoing transaction with The Brinks Company, they have decided not to conduct an earnings conference call or provide a financial forecast. Atleos, a prominent player in self-service financial solutions, specializes in ATM services and holds a leading position in the industry.

data.title: Pernod Ricard and Brown-Forman Terminate Discussions Regarding Potential Combination
data.description: Pernod Ricard (RI: Paris) recently announced the conclusion of discussions with Brown-Forman regarding a possible merger, which occurred on 26th March 2026. The discussions ultimately did not lead to an agreement as mutually acceptable terms could not be reached. Pernod Ricard expresses confidence in its strategy and operating model moving forward.

data.title: NexPoint Real Estate Finance, Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: NexPoint Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NYSE: NREF) based in Dallas, revealed today that their board of directors approved a quarterly regular dividend of $0.50 per share for NREF common stock. Shareholders are set to receive this dividend on June 30, 2026.

data.title: Euronet Worldwide Announces Passing of Board Member Andrzej Olechowski
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Euronet Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ: EEFT) based in Leawood, Kansas, shared the news of the passing of Andrzej Olechowski, a member of their Board of Directors, who died on April 25, 2026, at 78 years old.

data.title: Amesite Announces Closing of Up To $7.8 Million Concurrent Registered Direct Offering and Private Placements Priced At-the-Market Under Nasdaq Rules
data.description: An initial payment of $2.6 million has been made, with the potential for a total of around $5.2 million in proceeds if all warrants are exercised in full.

data.title: Finning will release Q1 2026 results on May 12 and host investor call on May 13, 2026.
data.description: The recent report indicates that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8% in the US. This decrease comes after 250,000 new jobs were added to the economy last month, exceeding economists' expectations. The labor force participation rate also rose to 62.4%, showing more people are actively seeking employment. The biggest job gains were seen in the leisure and hospitality sectors, with an increase of 90,000 jobs. Additionally, average hourly earnings rose by 0.3% in the same period. Overall, these numbers point to a positive trend in the US labor market, marking a significant improvement in the job market conditions.
Helium Evolution files 2025 year-end financial results.

data.title: Thomson Reuters Announces Voting Results of Return of Capital and Share Consolidation Transactions
data.description: Toronto-based company Thomson Reuters (TSX/Nasdaq: TRI) disclosed the outcomes of its special shareholder meeting conducted on April 28, 2026. Shareholders gave the green light to a proposal regarding the return of capital and share consolidation transactions. The in-person meeting resulted in the approval of a plan of arrangement outlined by the company.
